manufacturers.name: Astera
manufacturers.notes: Static page. Version at top as e.g. 'Firmware V5.16.24'. Current: V5.16.24

manufacturers.name: Fiilex
manufacturers.notes: Static PHP page. First LAST UPDATED date used as fingerprint. Current: NOV 11,2025

manufacturers.name: Nanlux
manufacturers.notes: Static page. Versions embedded in zip filenames — page is hashed since no single version string.

manufacturers.name: Kino Flo
manufacturers.notes: WordPress page. Current: True Match Firmware 6.0

manufacturers.name: ARRI
manufacturers.notes: WARNING: May be JS-rendered. If fingerprint never changes despite real updates, this needs Playwright. Current: V5.6.1

manufacturers.name: Aputure
manufacturers.notes: WARNING: Shopify — likely JS-rendered. If fingerprint is always the same short stub, needs Playwright.

manufacturers.name: Blackout
manufacturers.notes: iPad app — version tracked via iTunes lookup API. Current: 2.5.2

manufacturers.name: Cerise (FTSLED)
manufacturers.notes: Firmware on public Google Drive folder. Requires Google Cloud API key — see SETUP.md.
